title: taraxacum orbicans
intro: Taraxacum orbicans, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum orbicans include its ability to support liver function, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating digestive issues and fluid retention. Taraxacum orbicans can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
